calendar.matters:
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-03-2007 Off Calendar

Prove-Up Hearing For Default
Off Calendar Dec-07-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, VJ: Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Gina Gonzales/Lyn Bura, CSR: Susan Lee.
Seth Pfalzer, Esq., for Plaintiff: The National Collection Agency,Inc. with Witness: Richard Olson, present, sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: David Tureaud, aka David Dureaud, Ind. dba Tureaud Events and Productions as follows:
Damages $46,196.32
Prejudgment Interest $4,979.10
Costs $385.00, for a total of $51,560.42
Judgment signed in open court.
